title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Philips India Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Philips India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
